name: logistics carriers managing 5–15 daily routes tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 daily routes, route deviations cause late deliveries. We generate daily delivery route deviation alerts instead of manual tracking of delivery routes.
problem_solved: Route deviations lead to late deliveries and increased operational costs.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Route deviations lead to late deliveries and increased operational costs.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 daily routes, route deviations cause late deliveries. We generate daily delivery route deviation alerts instead of manual tracking of delivery routes.
